text:
I find a peculiar energy in this space—part sterile modernity, part intellectual promise. The glass walls separate me from the vibrant installation inside, where concepts of research and development are on display.

Yet, the emptiness and silence give me a sense of anticipation. I feel suspended in thought, caught between the practical world of safety (the fire hose) and the abstract ideals of progress. This tension stirs my curiosity to enter and engage more deeply.
